snippet.title: Shakedown LIVE - WRC Croatia Rally 2021
snippet.description:
Don┬┤t miss WRC round 3 LIVE on wrcplus.com 22 - 25 April ­ЪЄГ­ЪЄи 

More FREE videos, news and results at https://www.wrc.com

Watch LIVE rally! All stages of every rally live or on demand with live cameras on stage, onboard and in the air, including expert analysis, behind the scenes stories, split times and real time GPS tracking. Thousands of onboard videos with moving maps, speed, gear, pedal and steering data, rally highlights, and exclusive videos all available on demand anytime, on any device with your subscription to WRC+ All Live.
http://www.wrcplus.com/

Find out about the official WRC video game on PC, XBox, Playstation and Nintendo Consoles here.
https://www.wrcthegame.com

eSports WRC Championship, is open to anyone, driving on the same roads and stages as the real-life WRC.
https://www.wrc.com/en/more/gaming/esports-wrc/

Rally Fan? Merch, clothing and more at the official shop of the FIA World Rally Championship.
https://shop.wrc.com/

Subscribe to this YouTube Channel for exclusive, frequent new rally videos.
https://www.youtube.com/user/wrc?sub_confirmation=1

Behind the scenes and more on Facebook.
https://www.facebook.com/WorldRally

Videos, photos, stories and competitions to win on Instagram.
https://www.instagram.com/officialwrc/

News, results, photos, videos on Twitter.
https://twitter.com/OfficialWRC

The WRC is the FIA World Rally Championship, a tough motorsport using rally cars on real roads around the world. Watch the best rally drivers battle on gravel and asphalt roads with mud, rain, dust, ice and heat! Watch high speed action as the rally drivers power slide and drift round narrow corners, go flat out over a big jump or through a watersplash, handbrake turn round a hairpin, survive a big moment, or have a massive crash! Rally requires maximum attack and careful tactics to become world rally champion.

Each rally has timed sections called special stages, on closed roads. Drivers complete these stages as quickly as possible. A co-driver reads pace notes that explain the hazards ahead. Rally drivers use the same rally car to travel to each stage on public roads, following normal traffic regulations. The crew which completes all the stages in the shortest time is the rally winner. Championship points are won using the same scoring system as Formula 1. The championship is administered by F├Еd├Еration Internationale de l'Automobile (FIA), motorsport's world governing body.

Over 30 countries have hosted WRC rallies. Rally Monte Carlo, Rally Argentina, Rally Finland, Rally Portugal, Tour de Corse on Corsica, France, Rally Sardegna on Sardinia, Italy, Safari Rally in Kenya, Acropolis Rally in Greece, Rally New Zealand, Rally Australia, Rally Japan, Rally GB, Rally Catalunya, Rallye Deutschland, Rally Mexico and many more.

Some of the world's greatest drivers have won the FIA World Rally Championship for Drivers, like Colin McRae, Carlos Sainz, Walter R├Хhrl, Stig Blomqvist, Petter Solberg, Ott T├цnak. The list of world rally champions includes many Finnish rally drivers like Juha Kankkunen, Tommi M├цkinen, Ari Vatanen, Marcus Gr├Хnholm, Hannu Mikkola. French drivers have had success with S├Еbastien Ogier, and 9 times world champion S├Еbastien Loeb. Famous drivers from other motorsports have come to try rally driving like Ken Block from Rallycross, and Robert Kubica and Kimi R├цikk├Хnen from F1.

Car companies compete for the prestigious FIA World Rally Championship for Manufacturers awarded to the most successful WRC constructor. Winners include Citroen, Hyundai, Volkswagen and Peugeot. Ford have had success with the Ford Escort, Ford Focus and Ford Fiesta when the M-Sport team won in 2017.
The 1980's featured the iconic Group B rally cars like the Lancia 037 and Delta S4, Peugeot 205 T16, MG Metro 6R4, Ford RS200 and Audi Quattro.
Japan dominated the 1990s with the Mitsubishi Lancer, Subaru Impreza, and Toyota Celica and Toyota Corolla. Toyota returned to the WRC in 2017 with the Toyota Yaris WRC, winning in 2018. The 2019 championship was won by Hyundai with the Hyundai i20 Coupe WRC. Find out about the latest winners and champions at https://www.wrc.com

snippet.title: ─љOGANI - Lockdown - Official video + Lyrics
snippet.description:
izvr┼Аni producent: ─љ. ─љOGANI
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
­ЪјД BUY/LISTEN ON:
Deezer --- https://www.deezer.com/sr/album/220806082
Spotify  --- https://open.spotify.com/album/1WBQiJwSCkQejkNysoGnfU 
Tidal --- https://store.tidal.com/rs/album/179745531
Amazon --- https://www.amazon.com/Lock-Down-Explicit-─љogani/dp/B091V6715V/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=lockdown+─Љogani&qid=1618212461&s=dmusic&sr=1-1
ITunes --- https://music.apple.com/us/album/lock-down-single/1561828922
Napster  --- coming soon
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Follow ─љOGANI: 

­ЪЊ▓  Booking manager: +381 63 206 422 
­ЪЊЕ djogani.djole@gmail.com

­ЪЉЅ Fan page --- https://www.facebook.com/Djoganifans/РђІ 

­ЪЉЅ Facebook --- https://www.facebook.com/djogani.grupaРђІ 
­ЪЉЅ Instagram --- https://www.instagram.com/djoganivesnaРђІ 

Subscribe to Channel ─љogani:  https://www.youtube.com/c/grupa─љOGANIofficial
Uklju─Їi ­Ъћћ da dobija┼А obave┼Аtenja za sve nove pesme!
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom. 
First, can someone who's been vaccinated 
still spread the disease? 

Lockdown ko knockdown
Djogani is in the house
With a brand new sound
No money no, no business
Put your mask on 
and keep the distance
Lockdown nervous breakdown
Fucking virus is flying around
We gotta move, move
we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sedim ku─Єi cele no─Єi maskiran
Svetom vlada ─Їudna epidemija
─їekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda pi┼Аe LOCK DOWN,
Vidi┼А na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci ─Їini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru ─Їekamo
Da me grli┼А ho─Єu jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva
Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Jo, jo, jo, jo...
Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Slu┼Аaj malo doktore na vestima
┼аta ─Єe dalje biti ba┼А me zanima
─їekaj, hani, hani, da pro─Љu ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
Jo┼А samo malo, evo ja ti dajem re─Ї
Puni─Їemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i Be─Ї.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je ─љole ─љogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je ┼Аto smo sami,
Ne mo┼Йemo vani
Zato do─Љi meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok ima┼А mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zahvaljujemo se:
­Ъјх Antonu
­Ъјх Marku D.
­Ъјх ┼йiki P.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ZABRANJENO je reupload-ovati na svoj li─Їni kanal zbog kr┼Аenja autorskih prava i kvarenja zvuka i nepotrebnog gomilanja na YouTube-u! Svako ka─Їenje Video spota na YouTube, bi─Єe prijavljeno YouTube administratorima. Sva autorska i izvo─Љa─Їka prava su za┼Аti─Єena.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
┬Е№ИЈ ONAIR MEDIA GROUP
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Kate and Camilla arrive at Duke of Edinburgh's funeral
snippet.description:
The Duchess of Cambridge and the Duchess of Cornwall arrive for the funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh at Windsor Castle.

The Queen and her family gathered to say farewell to the Duke of Edinburgh, who died just over a week ago at Windsor.

Kate Middleton arrived at St GeorgeРђЎs Chapel wearing a pearl necklace known as the Four-Row Japanese Pearl Choker.

The necklace was loaned to Kate by the Queen from the Royal Collection after it was given to Her Majesty by the Japanese Government.

Kate previously wore the statement necklace in 2017 at a dinner to commemorate the 70th wedding anniversary of Prince Philip and the Queen.

Read more here: https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/royal-family/prince-philip-funeral-kate-middleton-pearl-necklace-meaning-b1833126.html

snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
Aran┼Йman: @jonezr

https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviicРђІРђІ

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

snippet.title: Pravili ovaj kola─Ї? Ne ─Їekajte ni minute sve imate za njega! Pe─Їeni kola─Ї sa pudingom od vanile.
snippet.description:
Lako, brzo i jeftino napravite ukusan kola─Ї od vanile i mekane pi┼Аkote.
Recept ne smete propustiti. Podelite i sa drugima da vide kako je fin kola─Ї.
#vanila #kolac #recept
jeftino
brzo
lako
serpica recepti

Recept na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/04/peceni-kolac-sa-pudingom-od-vanile.html

Sastojci i priprema:

- 4 jajeta
- 8 ka┼Аika ┼Аe─Єera
- 2 vanilin ┼Аe─Єera
- 15 ka┼Аika mleka
- 10 ka┼Аika ulja
- 15 ka┼Аika bra┼Аna
- 1 pra┼Аak za pecivo (10 gr.)

- 700 ml. mleka
- 2 pudinga od vanile 
- 5 ka┼Аike ┼Аe─Єera

┼аe─Єer za posipanje i po ┼Йelji vo─Єe, ┼Аlag...umu─Єena kisela pavlaka, ┼Аlag i vo─Єe ili umu─Єen ┼Аlag sa jogurtom i po ┼Йelji opet vo─Єe ­Ъўђ

Uklju─Їite rernu na 180 stepeni, tepsiju pre─Їnika 35x20 oblo┼Йite uljem i bra┼Аnom.
Umutite jaja sa ┼Аe─Єerom i vanilom, dodajte mleko, ulje bra┼Аno, pra┼Аak za pecivo i kratko umutite dok se sve ne izme┼Аa.
Polovinu smese sipajte u pleh i pecite oko 10 minuta (ne du┼Йe).
Za to vreme skuvajte puding.
Vru─Є puding prelijte preko vru─Єeg kola─Їa, prekrijte ostatkom testa i vratite u rernu da se zape─Їe oko pola sata.
Vru─Є kola─Ї po ┼Йelji mo┼Йete posuti kristal ┼Аe─Єerom i ostaviti da se ohladi. Ise─Єi i u┼Йivati! Prijatno!

en.title: Did you make this cake? Don't wait, you have all the ingredients. Baked cake with vanilla pudding.
en.description:
Make a delicious vanilla cake and soft biscuits easily, quickly and cheaply.
You must not miss the recipe. Share with others to see how nice the cake is.
#vanilla #cake #recipe
cheap
fast
easy
serpica recipes
DonРђЎt wait a minute you have everything for him! Baked cake with vanilla pudding.

Make a delicious vanilla cake and soft biscuits easily, quickly and cheaply.
You must not miss the recipe. Share with others to see how nice the cake is.
#vanilla #cake #recipe
cheap
fast
easy
serpica recipes

Ingredients and preparation:

- 4 eggs
- 8 tablespoons of sugar
- 2 vanilla sugars
- 15 tablespoons of milk
- 10 tablespoons of oil
- 15 tablespoons of flour
- 1 baking powder (10 gr.)

- 700 ml. milk
- 2 vanilla puddings
- 5 tablespoons of sugar

Sprinkle sugar and fruit if desired, whipped cream ... whipped sour cream, whipped cream and fruit or whipped cream with yoghurt and fruit again if desired ­Ъўђ

Turn the oven to 180 degrees, cover the 35x20 diameter pan with oil and flour.
Beat eggs with sugar and vanilla, add milk, oil, flour, baking powder and beat briefly until everything is mixed.
Pour half of the mixture into a pan and bake for about 10 minutes (no longer).
Meanwhile, cook the pudding.
Pour the hot pudding over the hot cake, cover with the rest of the dough and return to the oven to bake for about half an hour.
If desired, you can sprinkle the hot cake with crystal sugar and leave it to cool. Cut and enjoy! Pleasant!

de.title: Schnelle Rezepte. Es wird dich begeistern! Gebackener Kuchen mit Vanillepudding.
de.description:
Machen Sie einfach, schnell und kosteng├╝nstig einen k├Хstlichen Vanillekuchen und weiche Kekse.
Sie d├╝rfen das Rezept nicht verpassen. Teilen Sie mit anderen, um zu sehen, wie sch├Хn der Kuchen ist.
#vanilla #cake #recipe
billig
schnell
einfach
Serpica Rezepte

Zutaten und Zubereitung:

- 4 Eier
- 8 Essl├Хffel Zucker
- 2 Vanillezucker
- 15 Essl├Хffel Milch
- 10 Essl├Хffel ├ќl
- 15 Essl├Хffel Mehl
- 1 Backpulver (10 gr.)

- 700 ml. Milch
- 2 Vanillepuddings
- 5 Essl├Хffel Zucker

Streuen Sie Zucker und, falls gew├╝nscht, Obst, Schlagsahne ... Sauerrahm, Schlagsahne und Obst oder Schlagsahne mit Joghurt und, falls gew├╝nscht, wieder Obst ­Ъўђ

Drehen Sie den Ofen auf 180 Grad und bedecken Sie die Pfanne mit einem Durchmesser von 35 x 20 mit ├ќl und Mehl.
Eier mit Zucker und Vanille schlagen, Milch, ├ќl, Mehl, Backpulver hinzuf├╝gen und kurz schlagen, bis alles vermischt ist.
Gie├Ъen Sie die H├цlfte der Mischung in eine Pfanne und backen Sie sie etwa 10 Minuten lang (nicht mehr).
In der Zwischenzeit den Pudding kochen.
Gie├Ъen Sie den hei├Ъen Pudding ├╝ber den hei├Ъen Kuchen, bedecken Sie ihn mit dem Rest des Teigs und kehren Sie zum Backen in den Ofen zur├╝ck, um etwa eine halbe Stunde lang zu backen.
Auf Wunsch k├Хnnen Sie den hei├Ъen Kuchen mit Kristallzucker bestreuen und abk├╝hlen lassen. Schneiden und genie├Ъen! Angenehm!

it.title: Ricette veloci. Ti delizier├а! Torta al forno con budino alla vaniglia.
it.description:
Prepara una deliziosa torta alla vaniglia e biscotti morbidi in modo facile, veloce ed economico.
Non devi perderti la ricetta. Condividi con gli altri per vedere quanto ├е bella la torta.
#vaniglia #cake #ricetta
a buon mercato
veloce
facile
ricette serpica

Ingredienti e preparazione:

- 4 uova
- 8 cucchiai di zucchero
- 2 zuccheri vanigliati
- 15 cucchiai di latte
- 10 cucchiai di olio
- 15 cucchiai di farina
- 1 lievito per dolci (10 gr.)

- 700 ml. latte
- 2 budini alla vaniglia
- 5 cucchiai di zucchero

Cospargere di zucchero e, se lo si desidera, frutta, panna montata ... panna acida montata, panna montata e frutta o panna montata con yogurt e, se lo si desidera, ancora frutta ­Ъўђ

Accendere il forno a 180 gradi, coprire la teglia diametro 35x20 con olio e farina.
Sbattere le uova con lo zucchero e la vaniglia, aggiungere il latte, l'olio, la farina, il lievito e sbattere brevemente fino ad amalgamare il tutto.
Versate met├а del composto in una padella e infornate per circa 10 minuti (non di pi├╣).
Nel frattempo cuocere il budino.
Versate il budino caldo sulla torta calda, coprite con il resto dell'impasto e rimettete in forno a cuocere per circa mezz'ora.
Se lo desideri, puoi spolverare la torta calda con zucchero cristallino e lasciarla raffreddare. Taglia e divertiti! Piacevole!

es.title: Recetas r├Аpidas. ┬АTe encantar├А! Bizcocho al horno con pudin de vainilla.
es.description:
Haz un delicioso bizcocho de vainilla y bizcochos suaves de forma f├Аcil, r├Аpida y econ├│mica.
No debes perderte la receta. Comp├Аrtelo con otros para ver lo bonito que es el pastel.
# vainilla # pastel # receta
barato
r├Аpido
f├Аcil
recetas serpica

Ingredientes y preparaci├│n:

- 4 huevos
- 8 cucharadas de az├║car
- 2 az├║cares de vainilla
- 15 cucharadas de leche
- 10 cucharadas de aceite
- 15 cucharadas de harina
- 1 polvo de hornear (10 gr.)

- 700 ml. Leche
- 2 budines de vainilla
- 5 cucharadas de az├║car

Espolvoree az├║car y, si lo desea, fruta, nata montada ... nata agria batida, nata montada y fruta o nata montada con yogur y, si lo desea, fruta de nuevo ­Ъўђ

Gire el horno a 180 grados, cubra la sart├Еn de 35x20 de di├Аmetro con aceite y harina.
Batir los huevos con el az├║car y la vainilla, agregar la leche, el aceite, la harina, la levadura en polvo y batir brevemente hasta que todo est├Е mezclado.
Vierta la mitad de la mezcla en una sart├Еn y hornee por unos 10 minutos (no m├Аs).
Mientras tanto, cocine el pud├Гn.
Vierta el bud├Гn caliente sobre el bizcocho caliente, cubra con el resto de la masa y vuelva al horno para hornear durante media hora aproximadamente.
Si lo desea, puede espolvorear el hot cake con az├║car glass y dejarlo enfriar. ┬АCorta y disfruta! ┬АAgradable!

Uklju─Їite rernu na 180 stepeni, tepsiju pre─Їnika 35x20 oblo┼Йite uljem i bra┼Аnom.

snippet.title: Watch NASA's SpaceX Crew-2 Launch to the International Space Station
snippet.description:
Watch continuous coverage of NASA's SpaceX Crew-2 mission: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=21X5lGlDOfg

Watch as four astronauts launch from Earth to their new home in space, the International Space Station. 
┬а
At 5:49 a.m. EDT (9:49 UTC), the SpaceX Crew Dragon Endeavour spacecraft and Falcon 9 rocket will lift off from NASA's Kennedy Space Center in Florida. Shane Kimbrough and Megan McArthur of NASA, Thomas Pesquet of the European Space Agency, and Akihiko Hoshide of the Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency will join the station's crew, for a mission of approximately six months.
┬а
This will be the first launch through our Commercial Crew Program to fly two international partner astronauts, and the first reuse of a Crew Dragon spacecraft and Falcon 9 rocket for a crew mission.
┬а
Once aboard the station, the Crew-2 astronauts will spend a lot of time on science Рђћ in areas such as medical technology, human health, and materials to benefit life on Earth. The space station is a unique scientific platform, enabling researchers from all over the world to put their talents to work on innovative experiments. It has instruments that monitor our home planet's global climate, environmental changes, and natural hazards.

#LaunchAmerica

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral

snippet.title: NEW GIRL VS POPULAR GIRL AT SCHOOL! Prank Wars At School & Funny School Situations by Crafty Panda
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall Arrive For Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
Kate, the Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall were among the members of the Royal Family to arrive at Windsor Castle on Saturday ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

Because of coronavirus restrictions only 30 mourners will attend the funeral service, including Queen Elizabeth II, her four children and her eight grandchildren.

#KateMiddleton #PrincessBeatrice #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: OSIJEK vs DINAMO 1:1 (30.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U velikom derbiju HT Prve lige, ogledu 30. kola u Gradskom vrtu, Osijek i Dinamo su remizirali odigrav┼Аi 1:1. Situacija na vrhu ljestvice je tako ostala identi─Їna. Dinamo ima dva boda vi┼Аe i jednu odigranu utakmicu manje.

Jaki udarac Dinamo je zadao Osijeku ve─Є u petoj minuti. Sporo je reagirala osje─Їka obrana, a pogotovo ┼аkori─Є, ┼Аto je iskoristio Lovro Majer koji je iz blizine zakucao za 1:0 Dinama.

Igralo se krajnje otvoreno, ali je bilo primjetno kako su svi Dinamovi napadi opasniji. Odnosno, gosti iz Zagreba su bili konkretniji u samoj zavr┼Аnici. Mogao je Dinamo vrlo lako i pove─Єati prednost, ali su prilike propu┼Аtali Petkovi─Є i Majer.

Ipak, krajem prvog poluvremena se osjetilo da se Osijek budi, a pravo izdanje doma─Єeg sastava vidjeli smo u nastavku. Osijek je krenuo mnogo ┼Йe┼А─Єe i odlu─Їnije. Odmah je odli─Їno zaprijetio Mierez glavom, ali je sjajno reagirao Livakovi─Є.

No, napadi Osijeka nisu jenjavali te je u 64. minuti uslijedilo izjedna─Їenje. Na asistenciju Kleinheislera pogodio je Erceg. Pogodak je dao Osijeku dodatnu snagu i igralo se odli─Їno. Osijek je imao loptu i pritiskao, ali je Dinamo znao biti itekako opasan u kontranapadima.

Me─Љutim, mre┼Йe se vi┼Аe nisu tresle pa tako nakon ovog derbija s istih pozicija oba sastava nastavljaju lov na titulu prvaka.

HT Prva liga, 30. kolo: Osijek - Dinamo 1:1 (Erceg 64./Majer 5.)

snippet.title: Iz Slovenije s ljubavlju - Srbija do Une, Hrvatska do Drine
snippet.description:
Otkud sad ovaj dokument za koji samo Edi Rama priznaje da ga je video, da li zaista dolazi od Janeza Jan┼Аe ili je iza neko mnogo bitniji?

Kad se Jugoslavija raspadala on je bio slovena─Їki ministar odbrane; sad kad je Janez Jan┼Аa premijer Slovenije ponovo se govori o promeni granica na prostorima biv┼Аe Jugoslavije. I to sve zbog navodnog nezvani─Їnog dokumenta koji je potekao iz Slovenije a koji predvi─Љa ujedinjenje Srbije i Republike Srpske, Albanije i Kosova, Hrvatske i Zapadne Hercegovine gde ve─Єinski ┼Йive u Hrvati. Otkud sad ovaj dokument, za koji samo Edi Rama priznaje da ga je video, da li zaista dolazi od Jan┼Аe ili je iza neko bitniji i koliko je uop┼Аte realna nova promena granica?
Prvi je to pro┼Аle godine uradio tada┼Аnji ameri─Їki predsednik Donald Tramp. Dva puta su Amerikanci dobili direktne uplate na ra─Їun. Prvi put 1.200, a drugi put 600 dolara. Vrlo brzo posle Amerike i Srbija se odlu─Їila na ovaj korak i u junu pro┼Аle godine svaki gra─Љanin Srbije koji je to ┼Йeleo dobio je 100 evra iz helikoptera. Za┼Аto se ovaj novac zove helikopter mani, da li u Srbiji ima iste efekte kao i u Americi i za┼Аto se nova tran┼Аa koja se sprema i u Americi ali i u Srbiji sve ─Їe┼А─Єe zove dron mani?

U Oko magazinu pogledajte i razgovor sa nekada┼Аnjim peva─Їem Bijelog dugmeta Alenom Islamovi─Єem.

Urednik emisije: Gorislav Papi─Є
Label and copyright: RTS
 
Zabranjeno svako kopiranje video i/ili audio snimaka i postavljanje na druge kanale!

Kad se Jugoslavija raspadala on je bio slovena─Їki ministar odbrane; sad kad je Janez Jan┼Аa premijer Slovenije ponovo se govori o promeni granica na prostorima biv┼Аe Jugoslavije. I to sve zbog navodnog nezvani─Їnog dokumenta koji je potekao iz Slovenije a koji predvi─Љa ujedinjenje Srbije i Republike Srpske, Albanije i Kosova, Hrvatske i Zapadne Hercegovine gde ve─Єinski ┼Йive u Hrvati. Otkud sad ovaj dokument, za koji samo Edi Rama priznaje da ga je video, da li zaista dolazi od Jan┼Аe ili je iza neko bitniji i koliko je uop┼Аte realna nova promena granica?
Prvi je to pro┼Аle godine uradio tada┼Аnji ameri─Їki predsednik Donald Tramp. Dva puta su Amerikanci dobili direktne uplate na ra─Їun. Prvi put 1.200, a drugi put 600 dolara. Vrlo brzo posle Amerike i Srbija se odlu─Їila na ovaj korak i u junu pro┼Аle godine svaki gra─Љanin Srbije koji je to ┼Йeleo dobio je 100 evra iz helikoptera. Za┼Аto se ovaj novac zove helikopter mani, da li u Srbiji ima iste efekte kao i u Americi i za┼Аto se nova tran┼Аa koja se sprema i u Americi ali i u Srbiji sve ─Їe┼А─Єe zove dron mani?

U Oko magazinu pogledajte i razgovor sa nekada┼Аnjim peva─Їem Bijelog dugmeta Alenom Islamovi─Єem.

Urednik emisije: Gorislav Papi─Є

snippet.title: Audi RS6 generations DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click┬аhttps://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow┬аand my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

Check this out, RS6 fans - weРђЎve brought in every generation of the RS6 and they're going head-to-head in an almighty drag race! From the 450hp C5 through to the current 600hp C8, weРђЎre here to find out just how these four generations of RS6 perform over the quarter-mile. 

As youРђЎd expect, MatРђЎs in his long term RS6, the C8. With a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 under the bonnet, it can produce 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him, weРђЎve got Yianni in the C7. It may be powered by the same size engine as the C8, however, it can produce slightly more power (605hp), although itРђЎs also slightly down on torque (750Nm). 

The C6 may be several years older, but when you consider itРђЎs powered by a 5-litre twin-turbo V10, itРђЎs surely got to be in with a shout, right? Or perhaps the C5, with its 4.2-litre twin-turbo V8, could spring a surprise? 

All we know is, thereРђЎs only one way to find outРђд LETРђЎS RACE!

.............................................................

snippet.title: First Flight of the Ingenuity Mars Helicopter: Live from Mission Control
snippet.description: Up, up, and away! The Ingenuity #MarsHelicopter is set to make history. It will make the first attempt at powered flight on another planet on Monday, April 19. DonРђЎt miss your chance to watch live with helicopter team in mission control beginning at 6:15 a.m. EDT (10:15 a.m. UTC) as they receive the data and find out if they were successful.

snippet.title: Jury finds Derek Chauvin guilty of murder in death of George Floyd - 4/20 (FULL LIVE STREAM)
snippet.description:
The jury found former Minneapolis police officer Derek Chauvin guilty of second and third-degree murder and second-degree manslaughter in the May 25, 2020, killing of George Floyd.

The verdict comes after two weeks of witnesses and experts examining FloydРђЎs death and ChauvinРђЎs use of force. Judge Peter Cahill has allowed the proceedings to be broadcast live, which was a first in Minnesota history for a criminal trial. 

The PostРђЎs Libby Casey will anchor live coverage featuring reporters throughout the country Рђћ including Mary Beth Albright, Keith Alexander, Rhonda Colvin, Nicole Ellis, Robert Samuels and Eugene Scott. From Minneapolis, Holly Bailey, Hannah Jewell and Joyce Koh will deliver insights from the courthouse. Plus, columnist James Hohmann will add his analysis. Read more: https://wapo.st/3gqheW1. Subscribe to The Washington Post on YouTube: https://wapo.st/2QOdcqK

Follow us:
Twitter: https://twitter.com/washingtonpost
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/washingtonpost/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/washingtonpost/

snippet.title: How Russell seriously upset Mercedes in huge Bottas F1 crash
snippet.description:
When the F1 stewards declared the massive accident between George Russell and Valtteri Bottas at Imola a racing incident, that could have been the end of it. But both drivers didnРђЎt want to leave it there, and Mercedes boss Toto Wolff even voiced his displeasure. Against a backdrop of MercedesРђЎ uncertain 2022 driver line-up plans - which will affect both Bottas and Russell next year - Scott Mitchell explains all the key details of what happened during the crash and why the post-race fallout was so acrimonious

#F1 #Russell #Bottas #Mercedes

snippet.title: Introducing AirTag | Couch | Apple
snippet.description:
AirTag. Keep track of your keys, wallet, luggage, backpack, and more, all in the Find My app. Play a sound on the built-in speaker, or say РђюHey Siri, find my gym bag.РђЮ With select iPhone models, Precision Finding can lead you right to your nearby AirTag. If itРђЎs farther away, hundreds of millions of Apple devices in the Find My network can help track it down. All anonymously and encrypted for privacy. Because weРђЎre all human, and weРђЎre a lot better at losing things than we are at finding them.

Learn more: http://apple.com/AirTag

'Aquarium (Improvisation after Le Carnaval des animaux by Camille Saint-Sa├Фns)' - Thomas Enhco, Vassilena Serafimova & Camille Saint-Sa├Фns http://apple.co/Aquarium

#AppleEvent #SpringLoaded #AirTag

Welcome to the official Apple YouTube channel. Here youРђЎll find news about product launches, tutorials, and other great content. AppleРђЎs more than 160,000 employees are dedicated to making the best products on earth, and to leaving the world better than we found it.

snippet.title: Customizing a JUMBO Nesting Doll Set
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I am going to be painting on and customizing a set of Russian nesting dolls (or matryoshka dolls). Ever since I painted on my firt set of dolls, you guys have been requesting that I do it again, so I was really excited to finally decorate these and add my own style to them. It's a different type of doll customization haha. This was a really fun art project to do, I highly recommend it if you are looking for creative activities to do. There is so much potential to do all kinds of different characters with these and create a completely original set. 

These are really awesome collectibles and make for such cool home decor. I could definitely see myself building a collection of them. They're also really fun to take apart and put back together lol

Here are the nesting dolls I have (affiliate links):

The one I painted last time: https://amzn.to/2A4LzXyРђІ
The one I painted this time: https://amzn.to/375JM0EРђІ
*make sure to tag me on instagram if you paint your own!!!

*LAST CHANCE for the Rubik's Cube pre-order. Don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh ­Ъўѓ ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack SnyderРђЎs Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero whoРђЎs now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), itРђЎs with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thingРђЎs for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias Schweigh├Хfer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, Ra├║l Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

snippet.title: HAJDUK vs OSIJEK 0:1 (29.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U derbi utakmici 29. kola HT Prve lige Osijek je posve zaslu┼Йeno osvojio sva tri boda na Poljudu. S 1:0 svladao je Hajduk golom Miereza, najboljeg strijelca Lige.

U prvom poluvremenu se igralo ravnopravno, ali je bilo vidljivo kako su Osje─Їani u svakoj situaciji malo br┼Йi, ─Їvr┼А─Єi i odlu─Їniji. Krajem prvog poluvremena sva opasnost se preselila u splitski ┼Аesnaesterac, a ┼Аanse za uvodni gol su propustili Mierez, Bohar i Bo─Їkaj.

No, splitska mre┼Йa se zatresla odmah na startu drugog dijela kada je glavom krasno, s deset metara, pogodio Ramon Mierez. Bio je to njegov jubilarni 20. prvenstveni pogodak.

Iako je Hajduk imao zaostatak, stra┼Аno je te┼Аko dolazio u prilike. Ve─Єi je pritisak i tada stvarao Osijek, vi┼Аe je prijetio te bio bolji u ostatku susreta. U samom fini┼Аu utakmice Hajduk je primio novi udarac, zbog dva ┼Йuta kartona je isklju─Їen Fossati.

Osijek se tako nakon remija kod Slaven Belupa ovom pobjedom vratio u utrku s Dinamom, dok Hajduk nije iskoristio kiks Gorice te je propustio dodatni pritisak na tre─Єe mjesto.

HT Prva liga, 29. kolo: Hajduk - Osijek 0:1 (Mierez 48.)

snippet.title: Film Theory: Did Disney STEAL Finding Nemo?
snippet.description:
Never miss a Film Theory! Рќ║ http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH┬а ┬а

Disney is infamous for keeping a tight hold on it's copyright, including taking it to extremes with things that TECHNICALLY fall under public domain in their original format. Well, that is not what happened with Finding Nemo. You see, the story of Finding Nemo is VERY similar to a not as well known children's story. One that is NOT in the public domain. Today, Theorists, we are going to dive deep and figure out if Disney actually STOLE the story of Finding Nemo!
